organizations.name: BIOMEDICA CRO
organizations.description: We do biosample procurement through a broad network of partnered hospitals in Ukraine and supply them globally. Human biospecimen collection is an easy task with us.

specimen_sample.treatments: Treatment of the Main Diagnosis: Medications: Cyanocobalamin, i/m, from 19-Sep-2023 to 28-Sep-2023, Betametasone, ointment, from 19-Sep-2023 to 9-Oct-2023, Electrolyte solution, i/v, once a day, from 19-Sep-2023 to 28-Sep-2023; Treatment of Concomitant Diseases: No
